programs.title: House Hunters
programs.sub_title: Palm Springs Pains in the Back
programs.desc: A couple looks to upgrade to a home that has potential to host large charity events in Palm Springs, Calif.; they have issues agreeing on style, and for one of them stairs are deal-breaker.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.sub_title: Turning a Negative Into a Positive
programs.desc: A North Carolina duo turns a negative into a positive by purchasing their first home after being removed from their rental by a hurricane; She wants to settle down in a move-in ready home, but he hopes to build equity in a fixer.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.sub_title: Chicago High-Rise vs. House in the Burbs
programs.desc: A Chicago couple are looking for a bigger home where they can raise their son and have room for family to visit; she's a city girl and wants another high-rise apartment, but he prefers a big house in the suburbs.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A quirky couple in Austin, Texas, looks for a bigger home and struggles to agree on how much to spend; he needs plenty of space for his robots, and she wants a dedicated room where she can foster kittens.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A law school grad who is about to take the bar exam wants to buy a fixer-upper in Orlando, Fla., but her opinionated mom thinks taking on a project is a bad idea.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: She wants a move-in ready place with plenty of rooms for her hobbies, but he works in construction and just wants a place with a workshop.
